title: Capacity Observation
description: Observation of physical capacity metrics from a fleet run.

model_residency.description: DERIVED classification -- computed by projection from the raw model_* fields; producers/collectors must never set this directly.

model_loaded_at_start.description: Was the target model already resident when the run began?

model_load_count.description: Number of times the model was loaded during the run.

model_unload_count.description: Number of times the model was unloaded during the run.

model_load_s.description: Total seconds spent loading the model during the run.
